description.content:

Confirmed live from startup and solution navigation flows for resources including

`management.azure.com`, and `graph.microsoft.com`.

item.name: Get the SPA auth helper value

request.name: Get the SPA auth helper value

description.content:
Returns the same-origin SPA auth helper value used while bootstrapping the Purview home shell,
solution launcher, and Data Security Investigations experience.
The captured responses were `text/plain` HTTP 200 with an empty string body.

The Purview Portal API is used by the Microsoft Purview portal (`purview.microsoft.com`)
for same-origin bootstrap, token minting, role evaluation, user lookup, audit configuration,
and label activity analytics.

The operations below were confirmed while browsing the Purview portal with a real authenticated
Edge session. They were observed during startup and while navigating blades such as:

  - Home and solution launcher
  - Data Security Investigations
  - Agents, Learn, and Usage center
  - Compliance Manager
  - eDiscovery
  - Records Management
  - Audit
  - Settings > OCR

Requests rely on the authenticated Purview browser session and same-origin portal context.
`GET /api/Auth/getToken` was observed minting short-lived downstream access tokens for resources
including `api.purview-service.microsoft.com`, tenant-specific Purview service hosts,
`management.azure.com`, and `graph.microsoft.com`.

Documentation and specifications have been provided on a best-efforts basis and may not be
100% accurate.
